description_long: This is a young adult male with a punk-inspired appearance, featuring a short-sleeved, striped shirt that is semi-transparent and fitted, paired with cargo shorts and tall, rugged boots. His forearms are adorned with multiple wristbands and fingerless gloves, adding to the edgy, urban style. A prominent red patterned bandana covers his lower face, suggesting a sense of anonymity or street fashion. His hair is styled in a spiked, mohawk-like fashion, standing upright and sharply defined. The figure's stance is relaxed but alert, with arms slightly bent and hands loosely at his sides. The overall look is accessorized with visible piercings and a confident, streetwise attitude.
description: A punk-styled young adult male wearing a striped shirt, cargo shorts, tall boots, and a red bandana over his face, with spiked hair and wrist accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped shirt, red bandana covering the lower face, spiked hair, and wristbands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the spiked hair, bandana, and the layered wrist accessories.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the striped shirt, cargo shorts, and the full height of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the face, bandana, and arm accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: casual streetwear with a short-sleeved striped shirt, cargo shorts, tall boots, wristbands, and a bandana covering the lower face
